graph order
75
adjacency matrix

label vector
21 70 3 24 56 9 30 53 32 33 41 42 29 28 23 11 47 50 40 15 7 62 5 57 55 66 45 8 59 19 52 13 35 72 17 54 65 73 69 22 12 37 10 27 14 39 48 51 49 71 58 18 74 4 43 1 16 75 25 20 46 64 68 31 34 2 6 26 61 60 38 63 36 67 44
